title: Ittymaani: Made in China
subTitle: Ittymaani, who was raised in China, runs a business of counterfeit products in India. However, when he tries to help Annamma who is ignored by her sons, he lands in trouble because she falls ill.

title: Janatha Garage
subTitle: When Anand visits Hyderabad, he encounters Sathyam, who operates an organisation aiding the underprivileged. Sathyam, swayed by Anand's vision, hands over the organisation's management to him.

title: Kili Poyi
subTitle: Friends Chacko and Hari are fed up with their employer and plan a trip to Goa. Their trip turns into something unusual when they discover a mysterious bag.

title: Sakhavu
subTitle: Kichu is a heartless student leader who can go to any extent for power. He is asked to donate his blood to save a man named Krishnan, whose story changes him for the better.

title: Sunday Holiday
subTitle: Unni, who wishes to become a scriptwriter, learns that a director is hospitalised in his locality. He meets him to narrate his story about Amal, a heartbroken man who plans to start life afresh.

title: Snehaveedu
subTitle: Ajayan comes back to his village to be with his ailing mother. However, things get strange when a boy comes to his house claiming to be his son.

title: Thondimuthalum Driksakshiyum
subTitle: Newly-weds Sreeja and Prasad struggle to cope with their lives and decide to sell Sreeja's gold chain for money. However, a thief steals the chain during a bus journey, adding to their woes.

title: Srungaravelan
subTitle: Kanan falls in love with Raddhu, the daughter of a ruthless city gangster responsible for numerous deaths. To marry her, Kanan must confront the dangers and challenges that lie ahead.

title: Oru Marubhoomikkadha
subTitle: Madhavan is an honest and hardworking man. However, when a rich man's daughter, Eliana, asks him to abduct her and demand a ransom from her father, his life turns upside down.

title: Niram
subTitle: Aby realises that he is in love with Sona, his childhood friend, but is unable to express his feelings. However, he faces a dilemma when he learns that her marriage has already been arranged.

title: Niram
subTitle: Aby realises that he is in love with Sona, his childhood friend, but is unable to express his feelings. However, he faces a dilemma when he learns that her marriage has already been arranged.

title: Achayans
subTitle: When a family of four sets out on a road trip, they are accompanied by two girls on their way. However, things take an unexpected turn when one of the girls is found dead.

title: Irul
subTitle: Alex and Archana go on a trip but soon their car breaks down, and they take shelter at a nearby house. However, things take a turn when the owner of the house behaves in a suspicious manner.

title: Matchbox
subTitle: Ambu, a carefree college student, falls in love with a woman he sees at a bus stop. However, before he can confess his feelings, unexpected complications arise.

title: Sundarakilladi
subTitle: Without knowing the risk of his work, a man goes to a village to dig a well as they are facing water scarcity. However, his life takes a turn when he falls in love with a girl.

title: Geetha Govindam
subTitle: Vijay Govind, a young lecturer in a college, wishes to get married at the earliest. He tries to woo Geetha, an independent and a level-headed woman, who is not easy to convince.

title: Naran
subTitle: Velayudhan, an orphan, is loved by the villagers as he keeps the village free from unsavoury people and practices. However, an evil moneylender and politician get jealous and try to get rid of him.

title: Kammatti Paadam
subTitle: Krishnan returns home to Kammattippaadam after a call from his friend Ganga. Together, they face their dark past as old crimes resurface, putting their lives in danger.

title: Ennum Eppozhum
subTitle: Vineeth, a magazine reporter, lacks the inspiration to work hard. However, his life takes a turn when he is asked to interview a family court lawyer.

title: Pachakuthira
subTitle: Anandakkuttan's life as a young artist takes a dramatic turn when he takes his autistic brother under his wing, leading to an unexpected yet heartwarming bond between them.

title: Pachakuthira
subTitle: Anandakkuttan's life as a young artist takes a dramatic turn when he takes his autistic brother under his wing, leading to an unexpected yet heartwarming bond between them.

title: Gauthamante Radham
subTitle: Gauthaman's joy is palpable after securing his driving licence, as he dreams of driving the very first car his family has ever possessed.

title: Cheriya Kallanum Valiya Policum
subTitle: Sadasivan comes across a house where the owner, Kumaran, has committed suicide to protect his wife, Soumini. However, what is even stranger is that a man who is visually challenged is always around.

title: World Famous Lover
subTitle: An anthology of four inspiring love stories that showcase the diverse perspectives towards love that are prevalent among the different strata of human society.

title: Lalitham Sundaram
subTitle: When three siblings reunite with their families at their widowed father's home, old wounds resurface. Subsequently, their late mother's final wish forces them to confront the past and find closure.

title: Thanthonni
subTitle: Kochu, an alcoholic, is a member of the Vadakkan Veettil family who leaves them after a fight. He later comes home for his share when their wealth is being divided.

title: Ring Master
subTitle: Prince, a dog trainer, faces an awkward situation when his pet dog Diana acts in a film alongside his former lover, an actress who shares the same name as the dog.

title: Kunjiramayanam
subTitle: Kunjiraman's plan to marry Thankamani fails when his cousin, Laalu, breaks their union. Later, Kunjiraman goes to Gulf to make money and returns to take revenge on Laalu.

title: Vikram
subTitle: A special agent investigates a murder committed by a masked group of serial killers. However, a tangled maze of clues soon leads him to the drug kingpin of Chennai.

title: Kilometers and Kilometers
subTitle: A poor tour guide from Kerala takes an American client on a journey through India. During their travels, the changing landscapes and experiences help them reshape their understanding of each other.
